titleText: JTF News: CBC News, PBS NewsHour
mainText: The Senate votes on a war powers resolution following U.S.-Israeli strikes on Iran.

titleText: JTF News: Deutsche Welle, BBC News
mainText: A Greek court upheld convictions of leaders of a neo-Nazi party.
Israel conducted airstrikes in Lebanon and Iran.

titleText: JTF News: BBC News, ABC News Australia
mainText: An 8-year-old Australian girl died in a snowmobile accident in Japan.

titleText: JTF News: BBC News, ABC News Australia
mainText: US and Ecuador forces launch operation to fight drug trafficking.
